hero.layout: Grid with large heading left, abstract data visual right
elements: Subhead: 'Get verified B2B leads from Apollo directly to your CRM. No manual work. 99% accuracy.'

trust.title: Trusted by Data-Driven Teams
trust.layout: Marquee of tech logos (use lucide icons or text as placeholders if images unavailable)

items.title: 99% Verified Emails
items.desc: We double-verify every email to ensure zero bounce rates.

items.title: Custom Filtering
items.desc: Filter by industry, revenue, headcount, and tech stack.

items.title: CRM Integration
items.desc: Direct export to HubSpot, Salesforce, or CSV.

items.title: GDPR Compliant
items.desc: Fully compliant scraping methods that respect privacy.

items.title: Fast Turnaround
items.desc: Get your list of 10,000+ leads in under 24 hours.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.desc: 24/7 access to our data experts via WhatsApp.

how_it_works.layout: Horizontal Step Process with connecting lines

steps.title: Share Criteria
steps.desc: Send us your Apollo search URL or lead criteria.

steps.title: We Scrape
steps.desc: Our engine extracts and verifies data points.

steps.title: Receive Data
steps.desc: Get a clean CSV/Excel file or CRM sync.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'react-icons/fa' for WhatsApp icon if needed.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings (Import from Google Fonts).
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-950 (#020617) as the darkest shade.
Ensure the WhatsApp button is always visible or prominent.
The Form MUST submit to the backend API which stores in MongoDB.
Add a 'floating' effect to the feature cards using hover:translate-y.
Use a 'glow' effect behind the Hero image or main CTA.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge` (or yarn add).
2. Setup Tailwind to use the 'Outfit' and 'Inter' fonts.
3. Create a layout component that wraps the page with a dark background.
4. Implement the components using the design styles defined above.
5. Ensure the Contact Form captures data and sends it to the backend endpoint.
6. Add the WhatsApp floating button fixed at bottom-right.
7. Use the provided image URLs for background and trust sections.
